raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The city of Menlo Park will receive $4.5 million to fund its municipal electrification program.",
    "The city's Climate Action Plan sets a 2030 goal of carbon neutrality.",
    "Fossil fuel use in structures accounts for 41% of Menlo Park’s greenhouse gas emissions.",
    "Building electrification is key to Menlo Park reaching its carbon neutrality goal.",
    "The partnership with BlocPower aims to make decarbonization accessible to those who could not otherwise afford it.",
    "The city of Redwood City will receive $4.45 million to convert two public parking lots into park space.",
    "Funding in Redwood City will help replace synthetic turf fields in underserved neighborhoods.",
    "The city of Palo Alto will receive $2 million to replace the Newell Road Bridge to improve safety for all modes of transportation.",
    "Replacing the Newell Road Bridge will improve bicycle connectivity and minimize flooding risks.",
    "The city of South San Francisco will receive $1 million for programs to foster entrepreneurship and provide job training.",
    "The San Mateo County Union Community Alliance will receive $500,000 to fund the Trades Introduction Program.",
    "The Trades Introduction Program focuses on serving women, BIPOC individuals, and other underrepresented populations."
  ]
}
```
